title: The Diamond Dimensions Reborn
description: A modern port and upgrade of DanTDM's Diamond Dimensions modpack from 2015.
body:
**A modern port and upgrade of DanTDM's Diamond Dimensions modpack from 2015.**

This modpack contains several of the main mods that DanTDM used in his original Diamond Dimensions modded survival series, replaces some of the non-updated mods with newer and better mods, and adds a ton of extra mods to replace those that couldn't be included.

---

![A view of the Milky Way galaxy at night from a forest with "The Diamond Dimensions Reborn" logo in the center.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc6134aa552fdaa3fea933811580f8a8fae97462.jpeg)

---

Since the modpack was ported to NeoForge 1.21.1, there will be some previously included mods that haven't been ported over yet. The solution is simply to be patient. When these mods are ported, they will be added. Until then, enjoy what we have so far  :)

If you feel like I've missed any important mods, you want to suggest some new mods, or you have ideas to make the mods work better together, join my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/Nud3XXnv3A) and tell me in the Suggestions channel!

Special thanks to [DanTDM](https://www.youtube.com/@DanTDM) himself for creating the original Diamond Dimensions modpack and [survival series](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLUR-PCZCUv7R3VjBb5ejWOSbnHYPGKjJn), as well as being a large part of the childhoods of myself and many others! He also uploaded a [new modded series](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N_UDeC59mLU) with the same name which inspired me to fully overhaul this pack!

---

For more information, see below:

<details>
<summary>Recommended Additions</summary>

- Better Combat (mods like Simply Swords benefit greatly from this mod)

For Higher Spec PCs:

- Distant Horions
- Simple Clouds (If you install this, remove Better Clouds and disable Iris and any other shader-related mods)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mods Awaiting NeoForge Ports and/or Updates</summary>

- Dimensional Doors
- Farlanders
- Questlog (Or any other quest mod that isn't FTB Quests, because that shit sucks ASS)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Included Mods From the Original Modpack</summary>

- Gravestones
- Iron Chests
- Magnum Torch
- Mutant Monsters
- The Twilight Forest

</details>

<details>
<summary>New Mods That Replace Old or Abandoned Mods</summary>

- Ars Nouveau (+Addons) (replaces Blood Magic and Botania)
- Create (+Addons) (replaces Buildcraft and Steve's Carts 2)
- Create: Copycats+ (replaces Miniblocks/Carpenter's Blocks)
- Damage Numbers (replaces Damage Indicators)
- Enchanting Infuser (replaces Enchanting Plus)
- YUNG's Better Dungeons, Dungeons and Taverns (replace any dungeon mods and Battle Towers)
- Sodium and Iris (replace Optifine)
- Macaw's mods and Supplementaries (replace MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod and Decocraft)
- Panda's Falling Trees (replaces tree feller)
- Regions Unexplored (replaces any biome mods and Underground Biomes)
- JEI (replaces NEI)
- Jade (replaces HWYLA)
- Simple Hats and Villager Hats (replace Hats)
- Simply Swords (replaces BattleGear2 and Better Swords)
- Traveler's Backpack (replaces Backpacks)
- Accessories/Curios (replaces Baubles).
- Farmer's Delight (+Addons) (somewhat replaces Candycraft)
- Xaero's Minimap/Worldmap (replaces Rei's Minimap)
- Zombie Awareness (replaces InfernalMobs)
- Guard Villagers, Villager Names, Village Healthcare, and Wildfire's Female Gender Mod (replace Minecraft Comes Alive)
- Familiar Friends (replaces Familiars/Fampack)

</details>

<details>
<summary>New Mods That Weren't in the Original Pack</summary>

- Advancement Plaques
- Better Archaeology
- Better Clouds
- Bosses of Mass Destruction
- Creeper Overhaul
- Combat Roll
- Diagonal Fences, Walls, and Windows
- Dragon Mounts Remastered
- Easy Anvils
- Easy Magic
- Enderman Overhaul
- Essential
- Explosive Enhancement (Reforged version)
- Friends & Foes (+Addons)
- Gigeresque
- Haunted Harvest
- Immersive Aircraft
- L_Ender's Cataclysm
- Lootr
- Luminous
- Man of Many Planes
- Modular Golems
- Particle Rain
- Sawmill
- Simple Voice Chat
- Snowy Spirit
- ~~Stellar View~~ (Temporarily removed due to crashes)
- Storage Drawers
- Straw Statues
- Sweety's Archaeology
- Towers of the Wild
- Visual Workbench
- Wakes
- Wraith Waystones

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mods That Couldn't be Included, Weren't Compatible, and/or Will be Included in the Future if Possible</summary>

- Mo Creatures (Sort of unnecessary considering how many new mobs there are anyway. If Alex's Mobs is ported to NeoForge 1.21.1, I may consider adding that instead.)
- Special Armour
- Armour Status HUD (There's already a lot of stuff on the screen bro...)
- Advanced Genetics
- Atum Desert Dimension
- Pneumatic Craft
- Cars and Drives
- Grimoire of Gaia (Doesn't suit the style of the modpack, and the modern version is really weird and not modpack-friendly.)
- Ruins
- Zelda Sword Skills
- Sync
- The Eternal Frost
- Lucky Blocks
- Galacticraft
- Mo Villages

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mods That Weren't in the Original Pack but Will DEFINITELY be Included in the Future if Possible</summary>

- The Aether II
- Create Aeronautics

</details>
